meta.summary: Fast multi-threaded k-mer counter for DNA sequence data, with count, dump, query, histo, stats, mem, and Bloom-counter modes.
meta.description: Fast multi-threaded k-mer counter for DNA sequence data, with count, dump, query, histo, stats, mem, and Bloom-counter modes.

test: jellyfish count --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: jellyfish count' >/dev/null && jellyfish dump --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: jellyfish dump' >/dev/null && jellyfish histo --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: jellyfish histo' >/dev/null && jellyfish query --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: jellyfish query' >/dev/null && jellyfish stats --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: jellyfish stats' >/dev/null && jellyfish info --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: jellyfish info' >/dev/null && jellyfish merge --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: jellyfish merge' >/dev/null && jellyfish mem --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: jellyfish mem' >/dev/null && jellyfish bc --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: jellyfish bc' >/dev/null && jellyfish cite --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: jellyfish cite' >/dev/null
ldd "$(command -v jellyfish)" | grep -F 'libjellyfish-2.0' >/dev/null && ldd "$(command -v jellyfish)" | grep -F 'libhts' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-jellyfish-count && cd /tmp/taf-jellyfish-count && printf '>seq1
ACGTACGTACGT
>seq2
ACGTACGT
' > reads.fa && jellyfish count -m 4 -s 100 -t 1 -C -o counts.jf reads.fa && test -s counts.jf && jellyfish dump -c counts.jf > dump.tsv && grep -F 'ACGT 5' dump.tsv >/dev/null && jellyfish query counts.jf ACGT > query.txt && grep -F 'ACGT 5' query.txt >/dev/null && jellyfish histo counts.jf > histo.tsv && grep -E '^3[[:space:]]+1$' histo.tsv >/dev/null && jellyfish stats counts.jf > stats.txt && grep -F 'Distinct:' stats.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-jellyfish-merge && cd /tmp/taf-jellyfish-merge && printf '>seq1
ACGTACGTACGT
' > reads1.fa && printf '>seq2
ACGTACGT
' > reads2.fa && jellyfish count -m 4 -s 100 -t 1 -C -o a.jf reads1.fa && jellyfish count -m 4 -s 100 -t 1 -C -o b.jf reads2.fa && jellyfish info a.jf | grep -F 'canonical: yes' >/dev/null && jellyfish merge -o merged.jf a.jf b.jf && test -s merged.jf && jellyfish query merged.jf ACGT | grep -F 'ACGT 5' >/dev/null && jellyfish cite | grep -F 'Bioinformatics' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-jellyfish-gzip && cd /tmp/taf-jellyfish-gzip && printf '>seq1\nACGTACGTACGT\n' > reads.fa && gzip -c reads.fa > reads.fa.gz && gunzip -c reads.fa.gz | jellyfish count -m 4 -s 100 -t 1 -C -o pipe.jf /dev/fd/0 && test -s pipe.jf && jellyfish query pipe.jf ACGT | grep -F 'ACGT 3' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-jellyfish-sam && cd /tmp/taf-jellyfish-sam && printf '@SQ\tSN:chr1\tLN:12\nr1\t0\tchr1\t1\t60\t12M\t*\t0\t0\tACGTACGTACGT\tFFFFFFFFFFFF\n' > reads.sam && jellyfish count -m 4 -s 100 -t 1 -C -o sam.jf reads.sam && test -s sam.jf && jellyfish query sam.jf ACGT | grep -F 'ACGT 3' >/dev/null
